config: 64K serve: max-model-len 65536, kv 3.0GB, concurrency 1, prefix-caching on, dense index_topk=0, cutlass NVFP4 MoE, enforce-eager
method: SSE streaming, each depth run cold THEN warm (diff salt); report warm. prefill_tps=prompt_tokens/TTFT, decode_tps=(gen-1)/(t_last-t_first). Unique prompts (no prefix-cache hit).
correction: First sweep's prefill column was JIT-contaminated: --enforce-eager compiles kernels per-shape on first encounter, inflating that request's TTFT. The 4848-tok cell read 317 TPS cold but ~785 warm (verified 3x). This run warms each shape first; cold==warm here confirms the contamination is removed.

summary.prefill_tps: peaks ~790 around 2.6K ctx, eases to ~500 at 52K (dense MLA O(n^2) attention)
summary.decode_tps: flat ~8.4-9.7 across 0->52K depth (concurrency 1, MoE-weight-read bound, ~independent of context)
